title: Knowledge Demon

moves.title: Curse of Knowledge
effects: Force player to choose a card
Options: Disintegration (damage scales with counter: 6, 7, or 8) + MindRot/Sloth/WasteAway

move_pattern: Curse of Knowledge → Slap → Knowledge Overwhelming → Ponder → loops back to conditional branch. After 3 uses of Curse of Knowledge, the conditional branch switches to use Slap instead, creating the sequence: Slap → Knowledge Overwhelming → Ponder → Slap, etc.
notes: Knowledge Demon has a counter-based move cycling system. Curse of Knowledge increments a counter and presents the player with a forced card choice—the available cards change based on the counter value (0: MindRot, 1: Sloth, 2: WasteAway), but the first option is always Disintegration with damage equal to 6 + counter. After the counter reaches 3, the move pattern shifts and no longer uses Curse of Knowledge, instead cycling through Slap, Knowledge Overwhelming, and Ponder. The monster has an IsBurnt state: Knowledge Overwhelming sets it to true, and Ponder clears it to false, affecting which idle animation is played. Ponder also has multimodal healing that scales with the number of players in combat.
